content:
Hello everyone! (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)
     As some of you may already know, I am seeking collaborators, alongside Flares, for a writing project regarding Morimens’ lore and storytelling. The primary goal is to develop a comprehensive timeline and document key events within the game's narrative, utilizing a shared Google Sheet (for now at least).
     This is pretty much what we have in mind so far as a writing skeleton for our project: Each realm’s lore starting from Lemuria --> The realm’s premise and a more comprehensive explanation on its background story --> Key Terms (Specific terminology used) --> Awakers, with images and lore attached to them.

     Truth to be told, this is an ambitious undertaking and all forms of assistance would be greatly appreciated! ( ദ്ദി ˙ᗜ˙ )
     This being said, thank you for taking your time to read this post, and have a great day!~ 🪷
thread_title: Searching for Members Interested in the Game’s Lore!
